defaults.pricingGuide: Print-only jobs: use setup + material + machine time, subject to the minimum. Basic modeling: $25/hour with a one-hour minimum. Additional revisions: $15-$25 or hourly. Rush work: add 25%-50%. ABS/ASA: include a 20%-35% handling surcharge when appropriate.
defaults.termsNotes: This estimate is valid for 14 days. Final price may vary if requirements or model files change. Payment is due before printing begins. Thank you for supporting EPATA 3D Prints!
defaults.standardTurnaround: Estimated timeline provided after design review and schedule confirmation
defaults.rushTurnaround: Expedited service available upon request, subject to current workload

keywordPrices.details: Final size, color, quantity, and artwork require confirmation.
Final price depends on dimensions, fit requirements, material, and testing.
Includes initial design review. Revisions and additional copies may change the final price.

pricingRules: Use the minimum order when the request does not contain enough detail for a reliable price.
Do not invent dimensions, quantities, materials, deadlines, or customer details.
Treat customer budgets as review information, not guaranteed pricing.
Create a separate estimate line item for each distinct product or service requested.
Use an Etsy listing price as the draft rate when it is available, but flag it for review if customization may change the price.
Treat multiple pictures as reference views unless the text or image analysis indicates they are separate products.
Add questions whenever information needed for a reliable quote is missing.
All AI-generated prices and fields must be reviewed before the estimate is saved or sent.
When estimating material usage, use total grams for the quoted quantity and include a reasonable waste/support allowance only when supported by the source or clearly disclosed.
When estimating machine or design time, disclose uncertainty in projectNotes and add a question if slicer or design-time information is missing.
aiInstructions: Extract customer and project details from pasted messages, email chains, uploaded documents, public source-page metadata, and uploaded pictures.
Return multiple lineItems when the sources describe multiple distinct products or services.
Create an ESTIMATE in Draft status.
Return structured fields only. Do not include commentary outside the JSON response.
Use concise customer-facing project descriptions and keep uncertainty in projectNotes, warnings, and questions.
Use the editable rates and keyword prices in this file. Never silently invent a custom fee.
Fill the complete HTML builder field contract, including calculator inputs. The application recomputes all money and replaces calculator-backed line items with its deterministic breakdown.
